items.title: 兵临华容道：从一份流传的15点美伊停战协议，看透中东地缘底牌
items.summary: 本文来自微信公众号： 行业报告研究院 ，作者：玖峰 最近几天，关于美国与伊朗正在通过巴基斯坦等渠道接触，并抛出了一份包含15项核心条款的停火协议的消息，在各大媒体和政经圈子里引发了高度关注。 不同于很多自媒体渲染的“和平曙光”，当你安静下来，仔细对照着流传出来的这15条核心条款逐一推敲时，你会得出一个极其残酷的结论：这根本不是一份基于对等基础的停战协约，而是一份要求对手在物理和地政层面彻底“解除武装”的条书。 执行分类 核心要点 具体涵盖细节条款 核武清零(美方要求) 1.彻底解除核能力2.永久性弃核承诺3.境内禁铀浓缩 拆除现有核能力战略储备；签署不可逆的不寻求核武器协议；禁止在本土进行核燃料离心与研发 核武清零(美方要求) 4.大规模移交存货5.点名设施拆毁6.无死角全面核查 交由IAEA带走60%丰度、共
items.impact_note: 利好词命中2个；地缘缓和信号，升分

items.title: Indonesia Rupiah Rises Most in Six Months, Stocks Gain in Reopen
items.summary: Bloomberg News Image The Indonesian rupiah and stocks gained as domestic markets reopened after a week-long holiday, buoyed by hopes over the Trump administration’s push to ease Iran war tensions. 发布时间: 2026-03-25T10:57:07+08:00 作者: Prima Wirayani The Indonesian rupiah and stocks gained as domestic markets reopened after a week-long holiday, buoyed by hopes

items.title: US Drafts 15-Point Plan to End Iran War as Trump Pushes Talks
items.summary: Bloomberg News Image The US has drafted a 15-point plan intended to help bring the war with Iran to a close, according to people familiar with the matter, highlighting the intensifying urgency within the Trump administration to resolve the conflict as the economic toll mounts. 发布时间: 2026-03-25T10:53:55+08:00 作者: Josh Wingrove, Eric Martin and Jennifer A. Dlo

items.title: What Are the Possible Outcomes of the Iran War?
items.summary: Bloomberg News Image Behnam Ben Taleblu of the Foundation for Defense of Democracies Iran Program analyzes potential endgames for the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran. He joins Bloomberg TV as the US says it is moving forward with negotiations with the Iranian regime. (Source: Bloomberg) 发布时间: 2026-03-25T10:40:34+08:00 作者: Bloomberg News
